title: Spacecraft's Daring Dance with the Sun
story: Zooming through space, NASA's Parker Solar Probe made history on December 24, 2024. It swooped closer to the Sun than any human-made object ever before! The brave little spacecraft came within about 6 million kilometers of our fiery star. That's so close, it flew through the Sun's scorching outer atmosphere. Scientists were thrilled to gather new data about our nearest star from this incredible mission.
activity_question: How close did the Parker Solar Probe get to the Sun?
follow_up_question: Why do you think scientists want to study the Sun up close?

title: Miracle in the Amazon Jungle
story: High above the Amazon rainforest, a plane carrying 92 people crashed on December 24, 1971. The impact shattered the aircraft, scattering debris through the dense jungle. Amazingly, one passenger survived. Juliane Koepcke, just a teenager, fell from the sky strapped to her seat. She endured ten grueling days in the wilderness before rescuers found her, turning a tragedy into a tale of incredible survival.

title: A Silent Night's Magical Debut
story: Candlelight flickered as a gentle melody filled the air. In a small Austrian church, a new song was born. Little did they know this simple carol would become beloved around the world for generations to come.

title: Tiny Team Topples Basketball Giant
story: Jaws dropped in Honolulu on December 24, 1982, when a small college basketball team pulled off a stunning upset. story: General Dwight D. Eisenhower received a crucial call on December 24, 1943. President Franklin D. Roosevelt had chosen him as Supreme Commander of the Allied Forces in Europe. title: Neeraj Chopra: India's Golden Javelin Star

title: Beijing Shivers Through Record Cold
story: Brrr! Beijing felt like a giant freezer in 2023. The city shattered its chilly record from 1951, enduring over 300 hours of temperatures below zero. This icy blast wasn't just nipping at Beijing's toes. A massive cold spell swept across northern and northeastern China on December 24, turning the region into a winter wonderland. Residents bundled up in extra layers, sipped hot drinks, and found creative ways to stay warm during this frosty adventure.
activity_question: What record did Beijing break in 2023?
activity_choices: Its 1951 record for sub-zero December temperatures
Its record for snowfall in a single day
Its record for the number of ice sculptures built
Its record for hot chocolate consumption
activity_answer: Its 1951 record for sub-zero December temperatures
follow_up_question: How might people in Beijing have kept warm during this cold spell?

title: Captain Cook's Christmas Island Discovery

title: Speedy Skater Glides into History
story: Blades flashing on ice, Erhard Keller raced to glory! Born in Günzburg, Germany on December 24, 1944, Keller became a lightning-fast speed skater. His talent and hard work paid off big time. Keller zoomed to Olympic gold medals in the 500-meter event, not once but twice - in 1968 and again in 1972.
activity_question: In which event did Erhard Keller win Olympic gold medals?
follow_up_question: Can you name another winter Olympic sport besides speed skating?

title: Soccer Star Eddie Pope Kicks Off Life
story: Soccer defender Eddie Pope entered the world in Greensboro, North Carolina on December 24, 1973. He grew up to become a soccer superstar, helping the U.S. team win Olympic gold in 1996. Pope's talent and hard work made him a true champion on the field.
activity_question: Where was Eddie Pope born?
follow_up_question: What position did Eddie Pope play in soccer?
